case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JASON LUNA et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND VACATING JUDGMENT AND PERMITTING ENTRY OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND FOR ORDER CONTINUING RESTRICTION ON PUBLIC ACCESS CCP 1161.2 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, JASON DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1095 MISSION ST.,UNIT 300, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED JUN-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, JASON
